history.text: Panama became independent from Spanish Empire, marking a key step in modern statehood.
union with Gran Colombia tied the territory into a wider political structure.
Panama became independent from Republic of Colombia, marking a key step in modern statehood.
The current constitution came into force, setting the basic framework for today's Panama.

worthSeeing.title: Panama Canal:
worthSeeing.text: An engineering marvel linking the Atlantic and Pacific - 14,000 ships pass through yearly.

worthSeeing.title: Bocas del Toro:
worthSeeing.text: A Caribbean archipelago of stilted villages, sloths and turquoise surfing lagoons.

worthSeeing.title: Casco Viejo:
worthSeeing.text: A crumbling-chic colonial quarter on a bay peninsula, UNESCO listed.
